channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Rubio tells Al Jazeera Strait of Hormuz will reopen ‘one way or another’
item.description: This is a breaking news story.

item.title: Trump wants to ‘take Iran’s oil’: Can he, and what would that mean?
item.description: Trump said US forces could seize Iran's oil export hub at Kharg Island as the war enters its second month.

item.title: War on Iran disrupts Asia’s used-car exports to the Middle East
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran has lead to disruptions in Asia’s used-car exporting industry.

item.title: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in war on Iran
item.description: The announcement comes after Madrid refused to let Washington use jointly operated military bases for the war on Iran.

item.title: Why have the US and Israel bombed more than 75 Iranian police facilities?
item.description: An Al Jazeera investigation finds internal security facilities in populated areas have been heavily targeted.

item.title: Homes damaged as Iranian missiles trigger sirens across northern Israel
item.description: Missile debris from Iranian launches struck parts of central and northern Israel, damaging multiple areas.

item.title: Iran’s Foreign Ministry denies claims of US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Iran’s foreign ministry denied claims of negotiations with the US.

item.title: Trump ‘pretty sure’ of Iran deal, but can Pakistan-led efforts end the war?
item.description: Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkiye and Egypt set up a team for backchannel talks with the US and Iran.

item.title: Beirut apartment damaged in Israeli strike
item.description: An Israeli air strike has heavily damaged a residential building in Beirut’s southern suburbs.

item.title: Sirens heard across Haifa port
item.description: Sirens were heard across the port of Haifa on Monday, amid expectations of incoming missiles.
